summary: Iteration 3 (full EA-style visual redesign) frontend e2e verified end-to-end. All 16 review checkpoints pass. Site loads with 0 console errors and 0 broken images on home (13/13 loaded). Header is solid white (rgb 255,255,255) with logo wordmark 'Effective' orange rgb(234,88,12) + 'Mathematicians' rgb(28,25,23); desktop nav = [Home, Learn, About, Contact] (no middle Take Action) + right-side 'Take action' pill CTA data-testid=header-cta-take-action. Learn dropdown opens on hover and shows 2 sublinks (dropdown-link-problem-profiles, dropdown-link-resources). Mobile menu toggle clicks without error. HOME: hero-video + hero-cta-explore + hero-cta-about preserved; definition-section renders 'What is an effective mathematician?' with 4 ea-rule elements on page; Inspired-by strip renders all 6 partner wordmarks (Effective Altruism, Effective Environmentalism, High Impact Professionals, 80,000 Hours, Open Philanthropy, GiveWell); sneak-peek shows 6 image-top EACards and clicking a card opens modal-content (close works); four-ideas-section contains idea-1..idea-4; pull-quote rendered; begin-step-01..begin-step-06 (6 items) all present. /learn/cause-areas has kicker tiers 'Top priority', 'High priority', 'Medium/Emerging' visible and clicking a profile card opens modal-content. /learn/resources has all 6 underline-style filters (filter-all/book/article/website/podcast/course) — 0 pill (rounded-full) filters, book filter => 'Showing 6 of 24', search '80000' => 'Showing 1 of 24'. /about has theory-of-change + 8 partners as wordmark list; partner testids use dash-only slugs (e.g. partner-80-000-hours, partner-effective-altruism) — NO commas. /take-action has forum-hero-cta, bottom-forum-cta, way-0..way-3. /contact form inputs are border-bottom-only (borderBottom: 1px solid rgb(214,211,209), borderTop/Left: 0px, borderRadius: 0px) — underline style confirmed; form-submit transitions to form-success-state. Footer newsletter (newsletter-form, newsletter-email, newsletter-submit) transitions to newsletter-success on submit. No grid-paper/paper-warm/paper-soft classes anywhere (0 on home, 0 on cause-areas). Scroll-resets-to-top verified on navigation (scrollY=0 after nav from scrolled home to /take-action).
critical_code_review_comments: Contact form and newsletter signup are intentionally frontend-only state transitions per user request (MOCKED — no backend integration). Clearly documented in review request.
Hero video uses external Pexels CDN MP4; a poster image is set as fallback. Loads fine in testing.
Partner testids correctly use dash-only slugs now (commas stripped): partner-80-000-hours instead of prior partner-80,000-hours. Resolves cosmetic issue flagged in iteration_2.
Underline-style filter tabs on /learn/resources correctly implemented (0 filters have rounded-full). Active state uses orange underline as specified.
Contact form inputs implement border-bottom-only underline style (0 border-radius, no top/left/right border) as specified.
EA-style ea-rule horizontal black rule appears under section heads (4 on home). No heavy rounded box containers used in new sections (ea-card pattern is image-top + serif title + small meta line).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 EA-style redesign fully verified. Key data-testids: page-home, hero-video, hero-cta-explore/about, definition-section, four-ideas-section, idea-1..4, cause-areas-preview (6 EACards), cause-areas-cta, begin-step-01..06, contribute-section/cta, page-cause-areas (tier groupings), page-resources (6 underline filters + resources-search + results-count), page-about (theory-of-change, 8 partners with dash-slug testids), page-take-action (forum-hero-cta, bottom-forum-cta, way-0..3), page-contact (contact-form, form-input-name/email/topic/message, form-submit, form-success-state, form-reset with border-bottom-only inputs), newsletter-form/email/submit/success in Footer. Modal flow works via card click + modal-close. 0 grid-paper / paper-warm / paper-soft anywhere. 0 console errors. Hero intentionally preserved from iteration 2. Contact & newsletter remain frontend-only mocks per user spec.
